!sndbox-download-report analysis_id=65577395-48d8-4d51-bc97-bc2486f49ca0 type=json
Context Example
Human Readable Output
5. (Deprecated) Detonate a file
Submit a sample for detonation. This command is deprecated.
Base Command
sndbox-detonate-file
Input
name: sndbox-detonate-file

outputs.description: Analysis ID SNDBOX.Analysis.SampleName Sample data (file name or URL)
outputs.name: SNDBOX.Analysis.ID

outputs.description: Raised errors during sampling SNDBOX.Analysis.Link Analysis link
outputs.name: unknown

outputs.description: MD5 of analysis sample SNDBOX.Analysis.SHA1 SHA-1 of analysis sample
outputs.name: SNDBOX.Analysis.MD5

outputs.description: SHA-256 of analysis sample DBotScore.Vendor Vendor name: SNDBOX
outputs.name: SNDBOX.Analysis.SHA256

outputs.description: The name of the sample file or URL DBotScore.Type File
outputs.name: DBotScore.Indicator

outputs.description: The actual score DBotScore.Malicious.Vendor Vendor name: SNDBOX
outputs.name: DBotScore.Score
